title: True Cobblemon
description: A Cobblemon modpack that adds a few addons that makes Cobblemon feel like a true Pokemon game.
body:
# True Cobblemon
## Installation
- If you are using any modpack/mod launcher, download "True Cobblemon 1.0.0 [MODPACK]"
- If you don't have a mod launcher, download it [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1m3ge6r0lRjSVDptWyd4bSGphT5to3qdO/view). Paste the into your mods folder and unzip it.
## Features
- Every base Cobblemon feature
- A basic pokedex
- Addons that make Cobblemon feel like actual Pokemon
- Various optimization mods
